name: npa-vscode
description: VS Code completion and diagnostics for Node Persistence API repositories

scripts.test:core: cd ../.. && npm run build && node --test packages/vscode/test/*.test.js
scripts.test:host: cd ../.. && npm run build && pnpm --filter npa-vscode run build && node packages/vscode/test/run-extension-host.js
scripts.package:vsix: cd ../.. && npm run build && pnpm --filter npa-vscode run build && pnpm --filter npa-vscode exec vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository --out ../../dist/npa-vscode-0.1.0.vsix
scripts.package:check: pnpm run package:vsix && pnpm run verify:install
